uncertaintyNotes: The first Guides4Gamers draft import used a plate-scale assumption that pushed lower and right-side markers too far southeast. Named Atlantic Wall points were corrected against GamerGuides' independent map coordinates, then the Submarine Deck and Beach anchors were manually moved onto readable shoreline/entry positions pending gameplay validation.
The draft schematic is source-derived but still zone-based; it should not be treated as a true map plate.
The Atlantic Wall should keep an underground/interior view for tunnels, bunker interiors, safehouse interiors, and workbench-access paths instead of flattening every marker onto the surface plate.
Guides4Gamers map imagery and marker coordinates are imported only as private draft review data for The Atlantic Wall.
Exact markers remain unpublished until first-hand Vaexil review.
avoidCopying: Rebellion screenshots and in-game map art.
Sniper Elite Maps, Push Square screenshots, guide prose, and marker coordinates.
Guides4Gamers guide prose, screenshots, icons, public UI, and marker data for maps not explicitly approved for private draft import.
